{

      {"heading": "Requirement D3-7 (verification/testing)", "location": "Requirement D3-7"},
      {"heading": "Requirement D3-8 (evaluation)", "location": "Requirement D3-8"},
      {"heading": "Requirement D3-9 (documentation)", "location": "Requirement D3-9"}
    ],
    "concept_inventory": [
      "nonsampling error", "nonresponse", "unit nonresponse", "item nonresponse",
      "coverage error", "coverage ratio", "processing error", "measurement error",
      "nonresponse bias", "weighted response rate", "unweighted response rate",
      "unit response rate", "item response rate", "item allocation/imputation rate",
      "total item response rate", "quantity response rate", "total quantity response rate",
      "cumulative response rate", "selection probabilities", "convenience sample",
      "equivalent quality data", "key variables", "longitudinal/panel survey",
      "administrative records", "nonresponse bias analysis", "reinterview",
      "latent class analysis", "interviewer variance", "respondent debriefing",
      "response analysis survey", "geocoding evaluation", "mode effect",

      "disclosure avoidance", "information product", "quality control", "transparency",
      "record linkage", "confidentiality / protected information"
    ]
  },
  "concepts": [
    {"id": "c_nonsampling_error", "name": "Nonsampling error", "aliases": ["nonsampling error sources"], "description": "Error in estimates not attributable to sampling; the central subject of Standard D3, arising from nonresponse, coverage, processing, and measurement.", "grounding_span": "measures and indicators of nonsampling error are computed and documented", "location": "Purpose"},
    {"id": "c_nonresponse", "name": "Nonresponse", "aliases": ["nonresponse error"], "description": "A source of nonsampling error including household/establishment nonresponse, person nonresponse, and item nonresponse.", "grounding_span": "Nonresponse (e.g., bias from household/establishment nonresponse, person nonresponse, and item nonresponse).", "location": "Scope"},
    {"id": "c_unit_nonresponse", "name": "Unit nonresponse", "aliases": [], "description": "Failure of an entire sampled unit to respond, measured by unit response rates.", "grounding_span": "weighted response rates must be computed to measure unit and item nonresponse", "location": "Requirement D3-3"},
    {"id": "c_item_nonresponse", "name": "Item nonresponse", "aliases": [], "description": "Failure to obtain a response for a particular data item within an otherwise responding unit.", "grounding_span": "person nonresponse, and item nonresponse", "location": "Scope"},
    {"id": "c_coverage_error", "name": "Coverage error", "aliases": [], "description": "A source of nonsampling error from listing error, duplicates, undercoverage, overcoverage, and frame/universe mismatches.", "grounding_span": "Coverage (e.g., listing error, duplicates, undercoverage, overcoverage, and mismatches between the frame of administrative records and the universe of interest for the information product).", "location": "Scope"},
    {"id": "c_coverage_ratio", "name": "Coverage ratio", "aliases": [], "description": "An indicator of coverage error and potential bias computed using statistically sound methods.", "grounding_span": "Coverage ratios must be computed to measure coverage error, as an indicator of potential bias", "location": "Requirement D3-4"},
    {"id": "c_processing_error", "name": "Processing error", "aliases": [], "description": "A source of nonsampling error from coding, data entry, editing, weighting, record linkage, disclosure avoidance, and assumption inaccuracies.", "grounding_span": "Processing (e.g., errors due to coding, data entry, editing, weighting, linking records, disclosure avoidance methods, and inaccuracies of assumptions used to develop estimates).", "location": "Scope"},
    {"id": "c_measurement_error", "name": "Measurement error", "aliases": [], "description": "A source of nonsampling error from interviewer/respondent behavior, instrument design, collection modes, and inconsistent administrative data.", "grounding_span": "Measurement (e.g., errors due to interviewer and respondent behavior, data collection instrument design, data collection modes, definitions of reference periods, reporting unit definitions, and inconsistencies in administrative records data).", "location": "Scope"},
    {"id": "c_nonresponse_bias", "name": "Nonresponse bias", "aliases": [], "description": "Bias in estimates arising from nonresponse; triggers required analysis when response rates fall below thresholds.", "grounding_span": "Nonresponse bias analyses must be conducted when unit, item, or total quantity response rates for the total sample or important subpopulations fall below the following thresholds.", "location": "Sub-Requirement D3-3.6"},
    {"id": "c_weighted_response_rate", "name": "Weighted response rate", "aliases": [], "description": "Response rate computed with weights accounting for selection probabilities including subsampling for nonresponse follow-up.", "grounding_span": "weighted response rates must be computed to measure unit and item nonresponse", "location": "Requirement D3-3"},
    {"id": "c_unweighted_response_rate", "name": "Unweighted response rate", "aliases": [], "description": "Response rate computed using unweighted data, permitted in specified situations such as monitoring collection or preserving time series.", "grounding_span": "Response rates may be computed using unweighted data when:", "location": "Requirement D3-3"},
    {"id": "c_unit_response_rate", "name": "Unit response rate", "aliases": [], "description": "Rate of responding units; nonresponse bias analysis is required below an 80 percent threshold.", "grounding_span": "The threshold for unit response rates is 80 percent.", "location": "Sub-Requirement D3-3.6"},
    {"id": "c_item_response_rate", "name": "Item response rate", "aliases": [], "description": "Rate of response for key items; nonresponse bias analysis is required below a 70 percent threshold.", "grounding_span": "The threshold for item response rates of key items is 70 percent.", "location": "Sub-Requirement D3-3.6"},
    {"id": "c_item_allocation_rate", "name": "Item allocation/imputation rate", "aliases": ["item allocation rate", "imputation rate"], "description": "Rate at which key-variable items are allocated or imputed, computed for demographic surveys and censuses.", "grounding_span": "item response rates or item allocation/imputation rates (for key variables)", "location": "Sub-Requirement D3-3.1"},
    {"id": "c_total_item_response_rate", "name": "Total item response rate", "aliases": [], "description": "Aggregate item response rate computed for demographic surveys and decennial censuses.", "grounding_span": "and total item response rates", "location": "Sub-Requirement D3-3.1"},
    {"id": "c_quantity_response_rate", "name": "Quantity response rate", "aliases": [], "description": "Response rate for key variables in economic surveys and censuses.", "grounding_span": "quantity response rates (for key variables)", "location": "Sub-Requirement D3-3.2"},
    {"id": "c_total_quantity_response_rate", "name": "Total quantity response rate", "aliases": [], "description": "Aggregate quantity-based response rate; nonresponse bias analysis is required below a 70 percent threshold.", "grounding_span": "The threshold for total quantity response rates is 70 percent.", "location": "Sub-Requirement D3-3.6"},
    {"id": "c_cumulative_response_rate", "name": "Cumulative response rate", "aliases": [], "description": "Weighted response rate reflecting total attrition of eligible units over repeated waves or successive stages of collection.", "grounding_span": "cumulative response rates must be computed using weighted data", "location": "Sub-Requirement D3-3.4"},
    {"id": "c_selection_probabilities", "name": "Selection probabilities", "aliases": ["probability of selection"], "description": "Probabilities of sample selection, including subsampling for nonresponse follow-up, that weights must account for.", "grounding_span": "The weights must account for selection probabilities, including probabilities associated with subsampling for nonresponse follow-up.", "location": "Requirement D3-3"},
    {"id": "c_convenience_sample", "name": "Convenience sample", "aliases": ["self-selected respondents"], "description": "A non-randomly selected sample for which computing response rates is generally not appropriate.", "grounding_span": "convenience samples or samples with self-selected respondents", "location": "Requirement D3-3"},
    {"id": "c_equivalent_quality_data", "name": "Equivalent quality data", "aliases": [], "description": "Data of equivalent quality (e.g., administrative records, SEC filings, annual reports) used for nonresponding tabulation units in total quantity response rates.", "grounding_span": "the sources of equivalent quality data for nonresponding tabulation units must be listed", "location": "Sub-Requirement D3-3.2"},
    {"id": "c_key_variables", "name": "Key variables", "aliases": ["key items"], "description": "The variables/items for which item, allocation, and quantity response rates are computed.", "grounding_span": "quantity response rates (for key variables)", "location": "Sub-Requirement D3-3.2"},
    {"id": "c_longitudinal_survey", "name": "Longitudinal/panel survey", "aliases": ["panel survey", "longitudinal survey"], "description": "A survey with repeated waves for which cumulative response rates reflecting attrition must be computed.", "grounding_span": "For panel or longitudinal surveys, cumulative response rates must be computed using weighted data", "location": "Sub-Requirement D3-3.4"},
    {"id": "c_administrative_records", "name": "Administrative records", "aliases": [], "description": "External record sources whose nonsampling error measures (coverage, missingness, edits, nonmatches) must be computed.", "grounding_span": "Measures or indicators of nonsampling error associated with data from administrative records must be computed to inform users of the quality of the data.", "location": "Requirement D3-5"},
    {"id": "c_nonresponse_bias_analysis", "name": "Nonresponse bias analysis", "aliases": [], "description": "Required analysis of potential bias when response rates fall below defined thresholds.", "grounding_span": "Nonresponse bias analyses must be conducted", "location": "Sub-Requirement D3-3.6"},
    {"id": "c_reinterview", "name": "Reinterview", "aliases": [], "description": "A response-error evaluation method used to generate measures of nonsampling error.", "grounding_span": "Response error evaluation studies (e.g., reinterview and latent class analysis).", "location": "Requirement D3-6"},
    {"id": "c_latent_class_analysis", "name": "Latent class analysis", "aliases": ["LCA"], "description": "An analytic method used in response-error evaluation studies.", "grounding_span": "reinterview and latent class analysis", "location": "Requirement D3-6"},
    {"id": "c_interviewer_variance", "name": "Interviewer variance", "aliases": [], "description": "Variance attributable to interviewers, assessed through interviewer variance studies.", "grounding_span": "Interviewer variance studies.", "location": "Requirement D3-6"},
    {"id": "c_respondent_debriefing", "name": "Respondent debriefing", "aliases": [], "description": "A study method for assessing measurement error via debriefing of respondents.", "grounding_span": "Respondent debriefing studies.", "location": "Requirement D3-6"},
    {"id": "c_response_analysis_survey", "name": "Response analysis survey", "aliases": [], "description": "A study that generates measures or indicators of nonsampling error.", "grounding_span": "Response analysis surveys.", "location": "Requirement D3-6"},
    {"id": "c_geocoding_evaluation", "name": "Geocoding evaluation", "aliases": [], "description": "Studies of address matching and geographic allocation rates that indicate nonsampling error.", "grounding_span": "Geocoding evaluation studies (e.g., address matching rates and analysis of rates of allocation to higher level geographic entities based on postal place-name or ZIP Code matches).", "location": "Requirement D3-6"},
    {"id": "c_mode_effect", "name": "Mode effect", "aliases": [], "description": "Effects of data collection mode on responses, assessed through mode effect studies.", "grounding_span": "Mode effect studies.", "location": "Requirement D3-6"},
    {"id": "c_data_entry_error_rate", "name": "Data entry error rate", "aliases": ["data capture error rate"], "description": "An indicator of processing nonsampling error for data entry/capture operations.", "grounding_span": "Error rates for data entry/data capture operations.", "location": "Requirement D3-6"},
    {"id": "c_coding_error_rate", "name": "Coding error rate", "aliases": ["referral rate"], "description": "Error and referral rates for coding operations as indicators of nonsampling error.", "grounding_span": "Error rates and referral rates for coding operations.", "location": "Requirement D3-6"},
    {"id": "c_imputation_rate", "name": "Imputation/edit change rate", "aliases": ["edit change rate", "imputation rate"], "description": "Rates for editing and imputation operations that indicate nonsampling error.", "grounding_span": "Imputation rates and edit change rates for editing and imputation operations.", "location": "Requirement D3-6"},
    {"id": "c_disclosure_avoidance", "name": "Disclosure avoidance", "aliases": [], "description": "Disclosure avoidance methods, listed as a processing source of nonsampling error.", "grounding_span": "disclosure avoidance methods", "location": "Scope"},
    {"id": "c_information_product", "name": "Information product", "aliases": [], "description": "Any product released by the Census Bureau to which the statistical quality standards apply.", "grounding_span": "all information products released by the Census Bureau", "location": "Scope"},
    {"id": "c_quality_control", "name": "Quality control", "aliases": ["QC"], "description": "Interviewer and processing quality control activities producing measures/indicators and driving improvements.", "grounding_span": "interviewer quality control (QC) results", "location": "Requirement D3-2"},
    {"id": "c_transparency", "name": "Transparency", "aliases": [], "description": "Providing users insight into data quality, a stated purpose of computing and documenting error measures.", "grounding_span": "to provide transparency regarding the quality of the data", "location": "Purpose"},
    {"id": "c_record_linkage", "name": "Record linkage", "aliases": ["clerical record linkage"], "description": "Linking of records across data sets, a processing operation and error source (nonmatches, clerical linkage QC).", "grounding_span": "error rates from clerical coding and clerical record linkage", "location": "Requirement D3-8"},
    {"id": "c_confidentiality", "name": "Confidentiality / protected information", "aliases": ["protected information", "administratively restricted information"], "description": "Protection against unauthorized release of protected or administratively restricted information under federal law and Bureau policy.", "grounding_span": "unauthorized release of protected information or administratively restricted information must be prevented by following federal laws", "location": "Requirement D3-1"}
  ],
  "definitions": [],
  "claims": [
    {"id": "cl_weighted", "claim_text": "Except in the situations noted below, weighted response rates must be computed to measure unit and item nonresponse.", "claim_type": "normative", "grounding_span": "Except in the situations noted below, weighted response rates must be computed to measure unit and item nonresponse.", "location": "Requirement D3-3"},
    {"id": "cl_coverage", "claim_text": "Coverage ratios must be computed to measure coverage error, as an indicator of potential bias, using statistically sound methods.", "claim_type": "normative", "grounding_span": "Coverage ratios must be computed to measure coverage error, as an indicator of potential bias, using statistically sound methods", "location": "Requirement D3-4"},
    {"id": "cl_nrbias", "claim_text": "Nonresponse bias analyses must be conducted when unit, item, or total quantity response rates fall below the specified thresholds.", "claim_type": "normative", "grounding_span": "Nonresponse bias analyses must be conducted when unit, item, or total quantity response rates for the total sample or important subpopulations fall below the following thresholds.", "location": "Sub-Requirement D3-3.6"},
    {"id": "cl_unit80", "claim_text": "The threshold for unit response rates is 80 percent.", "claim_type": "normative", "grounding_span": "The threshold for unit response rates is 80 percent.", "location": "Sub-Requirement D3-3.6"},
    {"id": "cl_item70", "claim_text": "The threshold for item response rates of key items is 70 percent.", "claim_type": "normative", "grounding_span": "The threshold for item response rates of key items is 70 percent.", "location": "Sub-Requirement D3-3.6"},
    {"id": "cl_tqrr70", "claim_text": "The threshold for total quantity response rates is 70 percent.", "claim_type": "normative", "grounding_span": "The threshold for total quantity response rates is 70 percent.", "location": "Sub-Requirement D3-3.6"},
    {"id": "cl_nonrandom", "claim_text": "In general, computing response rates is not appropriate for samples that are not randomly selected.", "claim_type": "normative", "grounding_span": "In general, computing response rates is not appropriate for samples that are not randomly selected (e.g., convenience samples or samples with self-selected respondents).", "location": "Requirement D3-3"},
    {"id": "cl_admin", "claim_text": "Measures or indicators of nonsampling error associated with data from administrative records must be computed to inform users of the quality of the data.", "claim_type": "normative", "grounding_span": "Measures or indicators of nonsampling error associated with data from administrative records must be computed to inform users of the quality of the data.", "location": "Requirement D3-5"},
    {"id": "cl_verify", "claim_text": "Methods and systems for calculating measures and indicators of nonsampling error must be verified and tested to ensure all components function as intended.", "claim_type": "normative", "grounding_span": "Methods and systems for calculating measures and indicators of nonsampling error must be verified and tested to ensure all components function as intended.", "location": "Requirement D3-7"},
    {"id": "cl_evaluate", "claim_text": "Measures and indicators of nonsampling error must be evaluated to guide improvements to the program.", "claim_type": "normative", "grounding_span": "Measures and indicators of nonsampling error must be evaluated to guide improvements to the program.", "location": "Requirement D3-8"},
    {"id": "cl_doc", "claim_text": "Documentation needed to replicate and evaluate the activities associated with producing measures and indicators of nonsampling error must be produced.", "claim_type": "normative", "grounding_span": "Documentation needed to replicate and evaluate the activities associated with producing measures and indicators of nonsampling error must be produced.", "location": "Requirement D3-9"},
    {"id": "cl_confid", "claim_text": "Unauthorized release of protected or administratively restricted information must be prevented by following federal laws and Bureau policies.", "claim_type": "normative", "grounding_span": "unauthorized release of protected information or administratively restricted information must be prevented by following federal laws", "location": "Requirement D3-1"}
  ],

    {"type": "mentions", "from_id": "census-bureau-statistical-quality-standards-standard-d3-prod", "to_id": "c_geocoding_evaluation", "grounding_span": "Geocoding evaluation studies (e.g., address matching rates and analysis of rates of allocation to higher level geographic entities based on postal place-name or ZIP Code matches).", "location": "Requirement D3-6"},
    {"type": "mentions", "from_id": "census-bureau-statistical-quality-standards-standard-d3-prod", "to_id": "c_mode_effect", "grounding_span": "Mode effect studies.", "location": "Requirement D3-6"},
    {"type": "mentions", "from_id": "census-bureau-statistical-quality-standards-standard-d3-prod", "to_id": "c_data_entry_error_rate", "grounding_span": "Error rates for data entry/data capture operations.", "location": "Requirement D3-6"},
    {"type": "mentions", "from_id": "census-bureau-statistical-quality-standards-standard-d3-prod", "to_id": "c_coding_error_rate", "grounding_span": "Error rates and referral rates for coding operations.", "location": "Requirement D3-6"},
    {"type": "mentions", "from_id": "census-bureau-statistical-quality-standards-standard-d3-prod", "to_id": "c_imputation_rate", "grounding_span": "Imputation rates and edit change rates for editing and imputation operations.", "location": "Requirement D3-6"},
    {"type": "mentions", "from_id": "census-bureau-statistical-quality-standards-standard-d3-prod", "to_id": "c_disclosure_avoidance", "grounding_span": "disclosure avoidance methods", "location": "Scope"},
    {"type": "mentions", "from_id": "census-bureau-statistical-quality-standards-standard-d3-prod", "to_id": "c_information_product", "grounding_span": "all information products released by the Census Bureau", "location": "Scope"},
    {"type": "mentions", "from_id": "census-bureau-statistical-quality-standards-standard-d3-prod", "to_id": "c_quality_control", "grounding_span": "interviewer quality control (QC) results", "location": "Requirement D3-2"},
    {"type": "mentions", "from_id": "census-bureau-statistical-quality-standards-standard-d3-prod", "to_id": "c_transparency", "grounding_span": "to provide transparency regarding the quality of the data", "location": "Purpose"},
    {"type": "mentions", "from_id": "census-bureau-statistical-quality-standards-standard-d3-prod", "to_id": "c_record_linkage", "grounding_span": "error rates from clerical coding and clerical record linkage", "location": "Requirement D3-8"},
    {"type": "mentions", "from_id": "census-bureau-statistical-quality-standards-standard-d3-prod", "to_id": "c_confidentiality", "grounding_span": "unauthorized release of protected information or administratively restricted information must be prevented by following federal laws", "location": "Requirement D3-1"},
    {"type": "asserts", "from_id": "census-bureau-statistical-quality-standards-standard-d3-prod", "to_id": "cl_weighted", "grounding_span": "Except in the situations noted below, weighted response rates must be computed to measure unit and item nonresponse.", "location": "Requirement D3-3"},
    {"type": "asserts", "from_id": "census-bureau-statistical-quality-standards-standard-d3-prod", "to_id": "cl_coverage", "grounding_span": "Coverage ratios must be computed to measure coverage error, as an indicator of potential bias, using statistically sound methods", "location": "Requirement D3-4"},
    {"type": "asserts", "from_id": "census-bureau-statistical-quality-standards-standard-d3-prod", "to_id": "cl_nrbias", "grounding_span": "Nonresponse bias analyses must be conducted when unit, item, or total quantity response rates for the total sample or important subpopulations fall below the following thresholds.", "location": "Sub-Requirement D3-3.6"},
    {"type": "asserts", "from_id": "census-bureau-statistical-quality-standards-standard-d3-prod", "to_id": "cl_unit80", "grounding_span": "The threshold for unit response rates is 80 percent.", "location": "Sub-Requirement D3-3.6"},
    {"type": "asserts", "from_id": "census-bureau-statistical-quality-standards-standard-d3-prod", "to_id": "cl_item70", "grounding_span": "The threshold for item response rates of key items is 70 percent.", "location": "Sub-Requirement D3-3.6"},
    {"type": "asserts", "from_id": "census-bureau-statistical-quality-standards-standard-d3-prod", "to_id": "cl_tqrr70", "grounding_span": "The threshold for total quantity response rates is 70 percent.", "location": "Sub-Requirement D3-3.6"},
    {"type": "asserts", "from_id": "census-bureau-statistical-quality-standards-standard-d3-prod", "to_id": "cl_nonrandom", "grounding_span": "In general, computing response rates is not appropriate for samples that are not randomly selected (e.g., convenience samples or samples with self-selected respondents).", "location": "Requirement D3-3"},
    {"type": "asserts", "from_id": "census-bureau-statistical-quality-standards-standard-d3-prod", "to_id": "cl_admin", "grounding_span": "Measures or indicators of nonsampling error associated with data from administrative records must be computed to inform users of the quality of the data.", "location": "Requirement D3-5"},
    {"type": "asserts", "from_id": "census-bureau-statistical-quality-standards-standard-d3-prod", "to_id": "cl_verify", "grounding_span": "Methods and systems for calculating measures and indicators of nonsampling error must be verified and tested to ensure all components function as intended.", "location": "Requirement D3-7"},
    {"type": "asserts", "from_id": "census-bureau-statistical-quality-standards-standard-d3-prod", "to_id": "cl_evaluate", "grounding_span": "Measures and indicators of nonsampling error must be evaluated to guide improvements to the program.", "location": "Requirement D3-8"},
    {"type": "asserts", "from_id": "census-bureau-statistical-quality-standards-standard-d3-prod", "to_id": "cl_doc", "grounding_span": "Documentation needed to replicate and evaluate the activities associated with producing measures and indicators of nonsampling error must be produced.", "location": "Requirement D3-9"},
    {"type": "asserts", "from_id": "census-bureau-statistical-quality-standards-standard-d3-prod", "to_id": "cl_confid", "grounding_span": "unauthorized release of protected information or administratively restricted information must be prevented by following federal laws", "location": "Requirement D3-1"},
    {"type": "about", "from_id": "cl_weighted", "to_id": "c_weighted_response_rate", "grounding_span": "weighted response rates must be computed to measure unit and item nonresponse", "location": "Requirement D3-3"},
    {"type": "about", "from_id": "cl_coverage", "to_id": "c_coverage_ratio", "grounding_span": "Coverage ratios must be computed to measure coverage error", "location": "Requirement D3-4"},
    {"type": "about", "from_id": "cl_nrbias", "to_id": "c_nonresponse_bias", "grounding_span": "Nonresponse bias analyses must be conducted", "location": "Sub-Requirement D3-3.6"},
    {"type": "about", "from_id": "cl_unit80", "to_id": "c_unit_response_rate", "grounding_span": "The threshold for unit response rates is 80 percent.", "location": "Sub-Requirement D3-3.6"},
    {"type": "about", "from_id": "cl_item70", "to_id": "c_item_response_rate", "grounding_span": "The threshold for item response rates of key items is 70 percent.", "location": "Sub-Requirement D3-3.6"},
    {"type": "about", "from_id": "cl_tqrr70", "to_id": "c_total_quantity_response_rate", "grounding_span": "The threshold for total quantity response rates is 70 percent.", "location": "Sub-Requirement D3-3.6"},
    {"type": "about", "from_id": "cl_nonrandom", "to_id": "c_convenience_sample", "grounding_span": "convenience samples or samples with self-selected respondents", "location": "Requirement D3-3"},
    {"type": "about", "from_id": "cl_admin", "to_id": "c_administrative_records", "grounding_span": "nonsampling error associated with data from administrative records", "location": "Requirement D3-5"},
    {"type": "about", "from_id": "cl_verify", "to_id": "c_nonsampling_error", "grounding_span": "measures and indicators of nonsampling error must be verified and tested", "location": "Requirement D3-7"},
    {"type": "about", "from_id": "cl_evaluate", "to_id": "c_nonsampling_error", "grounding_span": "Measures and indicators of nonsampling error must be evaluated to guide improvements to the program.", "location": "Requirement D3-8"},
    {"type": "about", "from_id": "cl_doc", "to_id": "c_nonsampling_error", "grounding_span": "producing measures and indicators of nonsampling error must be produced", "location": "Requirement D3-9"},
    {"type": "about", "from_id": "cl_confid", "to_id": "c_confidentiality", "grounding_span": "unauthorized release of protected information or administratively restricted information must be prevented", "location": "Requirement D3-1"},
    {"type": "subtype_of", "from_id": "c_nonresponse", "to_id": "c_nonsampling_error", "grounding_span": "Nonresponse (e.g., bias from household/establishment nonresponse, person nonresponse, and item nonresponse).", "location": "Scope"},
    {"type": "subtype_of", "from_id": "c_coverage_error", "to_id": "c_nonsampling_error", "grounding_span": "Coverage (e.g., listing error, duplicates, undercoverage, overcoverage, and mismatches between the frame of administrative records and the universe of interest for the information product).", "location": "Scope"},
    {"type": "subtype_of", "from_id": "c_processing_error", "to_id": "c_nonsampling_error", "grounding_span": "Processing (e.g., errors due to coding, data entry, editing, weighting, linking records, disclosure avoidance methods, and inaccuracies of assumptions used to develop estimates).", "location": "Scope"},
    {"type": "subtype_of", "from_id": "c_measurement_error", "to_id": "c_nonsampling_error", "grounding_span": "Measurement (e.g., errors due to interviewer and respondent behavior, data collection instrument design, data collection modes, definitions of reference periods, reporting unit definitions, and inconsistencies in administrative records data).", "location": "Scope"},
    {"type": "subtype_of", "from_id": "c_unit_nonresponse", "to_id": "c_nonresponse", "grounding_span": "unit and item nonresponse", "location": "Requirement D3-3"},
    {"type": "subtype_of", "from_id": "c_item_nonresponse", "to_id": "c_nonresponse", "grounding_span": "unit and item nonresponse", "location": "Requirement D3-3"},
    {"type": "implements", "from_id": "s_d3", "to_id": "c_nonsampling_error", "grounding_span": "measures and indicators of nonsampling error are computed and documented", "location": "Purpose"},

  "proposed_relationships": [
    {"grounding_span": "Errors strictly associated with a modeling methodology. Statistical Quality Standard D2", "suggested_edge": "scope_excluded_delegated_to", "from_id": "census-bureau-statistical-quality-standards-standard-d3-prod", "to_id": "census-statistical-quality-standard-d2", "location": "Exclusions", "note": "D3 explicitly excludes modeling-methodology errors and delegates them to Standard D2; there is no allowed edge type for scope exclusion/delegation between a document/standard and another standard."},
    {"grounding_span": "Coverage ratios must be computed to measure coverage error, as an indicator of potential bias", "suggested_edge": "indicator_of", "from_id": "c_coverage_ratio", "to_id": "c_coverage_error", "location": "Requirement D3-4", "note": "Coverage ratio functions as an indicator/measure of coverage error, but 'measures' edges require a Measure/Instrument source and coverage ratio is extracted as a Concept."},
    {"grounding_span": "the response rate of the survey (or census) serving as the frame must be included in the computation of the cumulative response rate", "suggested_edge": "component_of_computation", "from_id": "census-bureau-statistical-quality-standards-standard-d3-prod", "to_id": "c_cumulative_response_rate", "location": "Sub-Requirement D3-3.4", "note": "Describes a computational dependency (frame survey response rate feeds the cumulative response rate) not expressible with the allowed part-whole/subtype edges."}
  ]
}
